{{Quote|Go and find Hammond Ballater and bring him to me. He knows better than to think that Black Sun would let him go completely.|Grobber|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Hammond Ballater''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] criminal. He was a member of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] syndicate on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] before he left the organization to work for [[Shalera]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|I'll go with you, I don't want this to get any worse.|Hammond Ballater|<ref name="SWG:AED" />}}
Even though Hammond Ballater left [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], the criminal organization never let their members go completely. Sometime following [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], he was approached by [[Grobber]], the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] subordinate of [[Zekka Thyne]], who demanded certain information from him. When Ballater refused to cooperate with Black Sun, Grobber sent a well armed [[Spacer/Legends|individual]] to find Ballater and bring him back to [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet]], the [[City/Legends|capital]] of Corellia. The individual was attacked by two thugs who were attempting to defend Ballater, but they were killed by Grobber's [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]]. Ballater then surrendered, as he did not want the situation to get even worse.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TemplateThug.png|250px|thumb|Possible depictions of Hammond Ballater]]
Hammond Ballater was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. Due to the nature of many older [[:w:c:swg:Quest|quests]] in ''Star Wars Galaxies'', the appearance of various characters could change each time a player performed the quest. Therefore, the [[canon]]ical species of Ballater remains unidentified. However, the quest dialogue given by Grobber indicated that Ballater was a male.
